programme.title: Gaither Gospel Hour
programme.desc: The Gaither Vocal Band performs with a host of gospel artists from all across the United States; it is headed by Bill and Gloria Gaither.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Wrestling with guilt or fear? Joyce says Scripture renews your mind, strengthens your faith through trials and anchors you in God's faithful, unchanging love.

programme.title: Turning Point With Dr. David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Dr. David Jeremiah shares the practical messages behind Christianity and helps people to discover their own turning points in their relationship with God.

programme.title: Praise
programme.desc: Featuring the contemporary Christian music and worship, ministry voices, interviews from a wide variety of guests and an hour of relevant talk.

programme.title: Main Stage
programme.desc: Gospel performances.

programme.title: Jesus: The Game Changer
programme.desc: Karl Faase travels to the U.K., U.S., Singapore, India and Australia, interviewing authors, academics and modern-day game changers about how the life and teaching of Jesus changed the world and why it matters.

programme.title: Insights -- Israel and the Middle East
programme.desc: A central theme in the life and times of Jesus, the Sea of Galilee is a living legacy of history, harmony and support.

programme.title: My First Trip to Israel
programme.desc: Sheila Walsh is in Israel to show the Jesus of the Bible and see where He walked and ministered.

programme.title: Praise
programme.desc: Matt and Laurie Crouch host Joyce Meyer.

programme.title: Hagee Ministries
programme.desc: The mission of John Hagee Ministries is to take the Gospel to all the world and to all generations.

programme.title: Turning Point With Dr. David Jeremiah
programme.sub-title: Forward Interview With Dr. David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Author Sheila Walsh; Dr. Jeremiah discusses his new book, "Forward."

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: The Battle Belongs to the Lord
programme.desc: We need God in our lives at all times. Learn how to lean on Him for help and why developing a close, personal relationship with Him is important.

programme.title: Steven Furtick
programme.desc: From Elevation Church in Charlotte, N.C., Pastor Steven Furtick offers inspirational messages through his sermons.

programme.title: Joseph Prince
programme.desc: Joseph Prince is a leading voice in proclaiming the gospel around the world through his ministry.

programme.title: Robert Jeffress
programme.desc: The teaching ministry of American Southern Baptist pastor and television host, Robert Jeffress; he is a senior minister of the First Baptist Church in Dallas as well as a Fox News contributor.

programme.title: Life Today With James Robison
programme.desc: James Robison is a former preacher who changed directions in his life several years ago and began hosting this television show alongside his wife, Betty, in order to reach out to help more people.

programme.title: The Supernatural Now
programme.desc: Apostle Guillermo Maldonado is the Sr. Pastor and founder of King Jesus International Ministry (Ministerio Internacional El Rey Jesus), considered one of the fastest growing multicultural churches in the United States.

programme.title: Rick Renner
programme.desc: Rick Renner's in-depth Bible teachings, using the Greek text, help listeners gain new insight from God's Word.

programme.title: Ron Carpenter
programme.desc: Ron Carpenter leads the Body of Christ to a new level and reaches out to the lost and hurting.

programme.title: Andrew Wommack: Gospel Truth
programme.desc: Hebrews: Living in the New Covenant Reality. Many Christians aren't living in the freedom that Jesus purchased for us. Most people mix the old covenant with the new covenant which shouldn't be done.

programme.title: Better Together
programme.desc: Sheila Walsh, Naomi Raine, Nicole Binion, Alexandra Hoover, and Blynda Lane share personal encounters with God, explore modern day miracles, and discuss the purpose of signs and wonders.

programme.title: Lawson Perdue, Grace for Today
programme.desc: Pastor Lawson Perdue from the Charis Christian Center outreach speaks to viewers across the globe about the practical message of Jesus Christ.

programme.title: Faith Is the Victory
programme.desc: Mark and Trina Hankins share messages about faith, helping believers understand their identity in Christ and the Holy Spirit's role in their lives.

programme.title: Allen Jackson Ministries
programme.desc: What's the best way to prepare for the uncertain future? Trust God with our resources! Pastor Allen Jackson talks about biblical principles surrounding the money, resources, and possessions.

programme.title: Turning Point With Dr. David Jeremiah
programme.sub-title: Forward Interview With Dr. David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Author Sheila Walsh; Dr. Jeremiah discusses his new book, "Forward."

programme.title: Joseph Prince
programme.desc: Joseph Prince is a leading voice in proclaiming the gospel around the world through his ministry.

programme.title: Main Stage
programme.desc: Gospel performances.

programme.title: Billy Graham Classic Crusades
programme.desc: Billy Graham shares that the greatest need is to be born again.

programme.title: Better Together
programme.desc: Laurie Crouch, Erica Campbell, Tina Campbell, Dee Dee Freeman and Holly Wagner share personal stories of how lifelong love begins and how to build a marriage that stands the test of time.

programme.title: Christine Caine
programme.desc: Christine Caine has a heart for teaching the Gospel and inspiring her audience to reach their God-given purpose; she is dedicated to reaching the lost, championing the cause of justice and building the local church globally.

programme.title: BillyGraham.TV
programme.desc: Franklin Graham answers the eternal question, "What is truth?"; featuring special music from legendary performers Johnny Cash, Charlie Daniels and Michael W. Smith.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Battlefield of the Mind
programme.desc: Joyce preaching the word of God. Join Joyce Meyer to discover the power of every word you speak.

programme.title: Touching Lives With James Merritt
programme.desc: Dr. James Merritt desires to make the name of Jesus Christ known as well as to help empower Christians in their daily walk with God; Dr. Merritt's purpose remains to bring the lost to a personal encounter with Jesus Christ.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Joel and Victoria Osteen's message of unconditional love and unending hope reaches everyone across the world.

programme.title: Winning Walk

programme.title: Life Today With James Robison
